allow: Bash(python3 -m venv /tmp/stone-env ; /tmp/stone-env/bin/pip install opencv-python-headless pillow 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "/Users/jaejin/Downloads/royal_match.mp4" ; ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "/Users/jaejin/Downloads/match3.mp4")

Bash(AUDIO_DIR=/Users/jaejin/projects/toy/game-arcade/food-crush-2/public/audio
DL=/Users/jaejin/Downloads

ffmpeg -y -i $DL/block-pop.wav -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/block-pop.mp3 2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "block-pop done"
ffmpeg -y -i $DL/swap.flac     -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/swap.mp3     2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "swap done"
ffmpeg -y -i $DL/rocket.wav    -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/rocket.mp3   2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "rocket done"
ffmpeg -y -i $DL/star.wav      -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/star.mp3     2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "star done"
ffmpeg -y -i $DL/fail.wav      -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/fail.mp3     2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "fail done"
ffmpeg -y -i $DL/clear.wav     -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/clear.mp3    2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "clear done"
ffmpeg -y -i $DL/rainbow.wav   -codec:a libmp3lame -qscale:a 3 $AUDIO_DIR/rainbow.mp3  2>&1 | tail -3 ; echo "rainbow done"
cp $DL/bomb.mp3 $AUDIO_DIR/bomb.mp3 ; echo "bomb done \(mp3 직접 복사\)")
